feedback.review: The scenery is beautiful, but the queue was too long and the schedule felt a bit rushed.

analysis.suggestion: Try visiting popular attractions in off-peak time slots.
user_suggestions: Try visiting popular attractions in off-peak time slots.
Keep fewer attractions per day and add rest blocks.
Choose routes with fewer transfers and stable travel times.
system_suggestions: Optimize the planning model with crowd-aware scheduling.
Rebalance itinerary pace by day length and transfer time.
Integrate transport reliability into route scoring.
analysis.summary: The trip was overall mixed (satisfaction score: 0.60). Key issues include long waiting time, tight schedule. Recommended optimization: Optimize the planning model with crowd-aware scheduling. and Rebalance itinerary pace by day length and transfer time..
